featureName: Fix confirmation sequencing — Assignments must exist before setting confirmation flags
description: Fix the sequencing bug where updateConfirmationRequirements() runs inside programInterventionAction (Step A) before updateInterventionAction syncs assignments (Step B). Result: confirmation flags are set on rows that get deleted/recreated, losing the data. The creation flow does it correctly: create assignments FIRST, then set flags.
prdSource: Bug report: confirmation data not saved correctly for fixed date appointments

userStories.title: Fix call order in use-intervention-planning hook
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want my confirmation selections to be correctly saved when scheduling a fixed date intervention, so that the selected participants actually receive a confirmation request.
acceptanceCriteria: In use-intervention-planning.ts: updateInterventionAction (assignment sync) is called BEFORE programInterventionAction
programInterventionAction's updateConfirmationRequirements() finds the synced assignment rows and correctly sets requires_confirmation=true + confirmation_status='pending'
If assignment sync fails, scheduling is not attempted (fail-fast)
userStories.notes: Moved updateInterventionAction (assignment sync) before programInterventionAction in handleProgrammingConfirm. Added fail-fast return if sync fails. Now mirrors creation flow order: assignments exist → then confirmation flags set on them.

userStories.title: Verify confirmation persistence end-to-end
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to verify the full data flow from UI toggle → server action → DB write → display, confirming that intervention.requires_participant_confirmation=true, slot.status='pending', and assignments.requires_confirmation=true are all set for a fixed date with confirmation required.
acceptanceCriteria: createFixedSlot: status='pending' when requiresConfirmation=true (already correct in scheduling-service.ts)
updateConfirmationRequirements: sets requires_participant_confirmation=true on intervention + requires_confirmation=true on selected assignments
No other code path resets these flags after they are set
userStories.notes: Verified full E2E path: createFixedSlot status='pending' (line 124), determineInterventionStatus returns 'planification' (line 50), updateConfirmationRequirements sets intervention flag + assignment flags (lines 238-266). updateInterventionAction line 754 not triggered (confirmationRequiredUserIds not passed from hook). No code path resets flags after programInterventionAction.
